overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a traditional Japanese coastal village at dusk. The character moves from a village path through tall grass fields, past a burning structure, and through narrow village alleys while the sun sets over the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese village path with wooden storehouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path between wooden farm buildings, carrying a sword on his back

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden building with thatched roof and elevated foundation
large stack of burlap sacks piled against the building exterior
leafless dead tree silhouetted against the dusk sky
thick black smoke rising into the sky from a distant fire

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a dirt path through a rural Japanese village at dusk. Traditional wooden farmhouses line the right side with stacks of sacks nearby, while a dead tree stands to the left and smoke rises in the distance against a purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with tall reeds at dusk

events.description: exits village buildings into open field with tall white grass and bamboo groves
sun becomes visible on horizon creating strong backlight and long shadows

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass fields with the ocean visible in the distance to the left

entered.detail: dense field of tall white reeds and grasses swaying in the breeze
cluster of bamboo trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide field of tall white grass and bamboo groves. The camera moves through the grass as the setting sun becomes visible on the horizon, creating a warm backlight effect against the purple and blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal area with burning wooden structure

events.description: approaching a burning wooden structure with thick black smoke rising from the roof

agents.ego_description: approaching a burning building while the sun sets brightly over the ocean to the left

entered.detail: damaged wooden building with smoke and embers rising from the collapsed roof
calm ocean water visible beyond the grass with distant islands
low sun on the horizon creating intense backlight and orange glow

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a burning wooden structure by the coast as the sun sets brilliantly over the water. Long shadows stretch across the path as the character moves past the smoldering building and re-enters the village area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village alley between traditional wooden buildings

events.description: encounters a villager in traditional clothing and straw hat walking ahead in the alley
exiting dark alley into brighter open area with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow dark alley between wooden buildings, approaching and passing a villager

notable_agents.action: villager wearing a straw hat and dark robes walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: large traditional Japanese residence with thatched roof and wooden pillars
traditional paper lantern hanging from a wooden post
simple wooden fence made of vertical posts and horizontal rails
tall wooden tower structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow dark alley between traditional wooden houses, passing a hanging lantern and wooden fences. A villager in traditional clothing with a straw hat appears ahead, walking in the same direction as the path leads toward an open field with a distant watchtower.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural Japanese village at dusk that transitions from open coastal fields into narrow, shadowed alleys. It begins along a dirt path lined with wooden farmhouses and stacks of sacks, moving past a dead tree as smoke rises against a purple sky. As the path opens, the camera glides through a wide field of tall white grass and bamboo groves, where the setting sun creates a warm backlight against the deepening blue of the horizon. The scene then shifts toward the coast, passing a brilliantly backlit burning wooden structure and stretching shadows before the character re-enters the village. Finally, the camera moves into a narrow, dark alleyway past hanging lanterns and wooden fences, following a straw-hatted villager toward an open field and a distant watchtower.
